The '''Battle of Ando''' was a skirmish between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] government of [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] members of the [[Andoan Free Colonies/Legends|Andoan Free Colonies]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. As such, it was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] civil conflict. The Republic sent members of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to assist the Free Colonies, some or all of whom died.

Jedi Knight [[Avan Post]] was recognized posthumously for his efforts in the battle.

{{Battle-stub}}
